name: Curry Delight
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Tomatoes; Cored and Chopped (1 Cup)
1 1/4 cups Apple; Core and Chop (1 Cup)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
Garnish:
1 x Peanuts; Chopped
Cook the meat and onion in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown. Drain off excess fat. Stir in the UNDRAINED tomatoes and remaining ingredients except peanuts, breaking up tomatoes when added. Heat mixture to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender (about 30-45 minutes). Add small amount water if necessary. Garnish with chopped peanuts just before serving. Alternatively, turn mixture into an ungreased 3-quart casserole, cover, and bake at 350°F, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender (about 45-55 minutes). Garnish with chopped peanuts just before serving.
